mapper.update: MERGE /* @SQLID=SUB0401_02-03#Sql001 */ INTO COR_SELF_CHECK_CONFIRMATION A USING ( SELECT B.COR_SELF_CHECK_ID, #{req.answerReason} AS COR_ANSWER_REASON, #{req.userId} AS COR_UPDATE_BY FROM COR_SELF_CHECK B WHERE B.COR_ENFORCE_DATE = #{req.registerDate} AND B.COR_BROKER_CODE = #{req.brokerCode} ) data ON ( A.COR_SELF_CHECK_ID = data.COR_SELF_CHECK_ID AND A.COR_SELF_CHECK_ITEM_ID = #{req.selfCheckItemId} ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET A.COR_ANSWER_REASON = data.COR_ANSWER_REASON, A.COR_UPDATE_DATE = IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, A.COR_UPDATE_BY = data.COR_UPDATE_BY
